reviews.review_description:
A Hidden Gem for Fans of Strategy, Exploration, and Precision Shooting

This game was a pleasant surprise! The core concept is simple: hunt trophies in the African savanna while driving a Range Rover and working alongside rangers. But there’s more depth than you'd expect.

Each successful hunt earns you upgrades, which adds a smart layer of strategy. Do you invest in better gear, ranger skills, or vehicle upgrades? That progression system keeps you engaged.

The animal variety is great, with different behaviors and trophy values. And there’s real satisfaction in mastering clean shots—heart or headshots give you the best rewards without damaging the hide.

The game flows really well—from the immersive lobby to the vehicle controls, to training and protecting your rangers. It’s a unique blend of exploration, resource management, and action. Definitely worth a try if you're looking for something fresh in the VR space.

A shooter game, where you have to kill wild animals to receive trophies.

You start driving in the bush with your car and 3 others. 
Watch out that you won’t get killed (or your teammates), or that the wild animals damage your car.

The longer you are in game, the more difficult.

Good game. 
Every round is different. Other animals, other difficulties.

smooth game . but you dont UPDATE IT EVER, or have a discord to show your interested in your own game.. someone should take this idea and make it better.. 1 gripe is  i cant skip the ride after collecting all the animals i could fit... game ends up being 30 min each time.  please add stuff to the game.. or increase the graphics... do  something game has no reviews Because you gotta speak and stop being lazy

developer_response.body: Hi!  Thanks for the feedback!  The game is usually updated once a week, but unfortunately Meta doesn't notify the user.  It looks like you are using an older version.   Please update to the latest version.  The max carry has been updated and there have been many bug fixes.  Thanks for playing.  More content and a Discord channel is on the way!
